channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 8,944 → 9,593 (+649) | Ranked #1
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. 702 stars today

item.title: TheCraigHewitt / seomachine
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 4,557 → 4,857 (+300) | Ranked #2
A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
Language: Python 649 stars today

item.title: google-ai-edge / gallery
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 19,485 → 19,740 (+255) | Ranked #3
A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
Language: Kotlin 853 stars today

item.title: newton-physics / newton
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 4,079 → 4,216 (+137) | Ranked #8

Language: Python 91 stars today

item.title: abhigyanpatwari / GitNexus
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 25,273 → 25,577 (+304) | Ranked #9
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
Language: TypeScript 980 stars today
